# CharterLegacy

> Premium Business Privacy & Succession Infrastructure

CharterLegacy is a digital estate and entity formation platform that combines zero-knowledge encryption with ministerial filing services. We provide Florida LLC formation, registered agent services, privacy-masked business identities, and automated compliance monitoring — all through a single sovereign operations hub.

## Core Features

- **LLC Formation**: Streamlined Florida LLC creation with privacy-first defaults
- **Registered Agent Service**: Professional registered agent with digital mail forwarding
- **Legacy Vault**: Zero-knowledge encrypted document storage for wills, trusts, and succession plans
- **Compliance Pulse**: Automated entity health monitoring for state (Sunbiz) and federal (FinCEN) requirements
- **Privacy Masking**: Dynamic identity aliases for business registrations (masked email, phone, address)
- **AEO Laboratory**: Answer Engine Optimization tools for marketing content

## Important Context

- CharterLegacy is a **technology platform**, not a law firm
- All filings are **ministerial** (form-filling based on user-provided data)
- We do **not** provide legal advice or outcome guarantees
- Based in **Tallahassee, Florida**, USA
- Built with **React**, **Supabase**, and **Web Crypto API**

## Links

- Homepage: https://charterlegacy.com
- LLC Formation: https://charterlegacy.com/#services
- Legacy Vault: https://charterlegacy.com/#vault
- Privacy Policy: https://charterlegacy.com/privacy
